title: Eclipse
description: Simple client-sided modpack that both boosts performance and has many QOL improvements!
body:
Prepare to transform your Minecraft adventures with Eclipse – a comprehensive collection of client-sided modifications that deliver a world of performance enhancements and quality-of-life (QOL) improvements right to your virtual doorstep. # **Performance Enhancements:** **Optimized FPS:** Eclipse has taken the hassle out of enhancing your Minecraft performance. Expect your game to run smoother, leaving no room for lag and stutter, as it fine-tunes your gameplay to maximize FPS. **Reduced Memory Usage:** With Eclipse, memory management becomes a breeze, reducing the game's memory requirements. Experience faster load times and smoother gameplay, even on modest hardware configurations. **Efficient World Loading:** Whether you're generating your world for the first time or exploring new terrain, Eclipse ensures your journey starts without delay. Load chunks with unprecedented speed, eliminating those frustrating waiting times. # **Quality of Life (QOL) Improvements:** **User-Friendly UI:** The Eclipse modpack introduces an elegant and user-friendly user interface, making your Minecraft adventure more enjoyable. Customize it to your liking for easy access to critical information such as coordinates and inventory. **Bug Fixes:** Eclipse not only enhances your game but also ensures a more stable experience by resolving various bugs and issues that might hinder your gameplay.

Eclipse elevates your Minecraft journey to new heights. Say goodbye to clunky gameplay and embrace a world of seamless exploration and creativity. Upgrade your adventures today, and download Eclipse for a brighter, smoother, and more enjoyable Minecraft experience. ***Note: Requires Modrinth desktop app to run.***
